prompt: A full-body, high-impact anime illustration featuring three powerful warriors on a shattered rock platform, combining the intense, detailed style of Dragon Ball Z/Super with the kinetic energy and modern tech-aesthetic of My Hero Academia. Centered is a {argument name="center character" default="Super Saiyan Blue warrior"} with spiky blue hair and glowing red eyes, in a shredded blue gi, enveloped by an intricate, glowing magical blue sigil and electric lightning. To his left, stands the explosive hero {argument name="left character" default="Katsuki Bakugo"} in his orange, black, and green hero suit, holding his classic crouching pose, surrounded by explosive orange effects and splash-art graphics. To his right stands an Ascended Warrior with massive silver hair, a purple gi, and red belt, contained within a large, vibrant green alchemical circle and toxic green aura. The scene is a maelstrom of cosmic and explosive energy, floating debris, and particle effects, set against a dark, power-charged sky.
